targets.query: from(bucket: "sensor_data") |> range(start: -5m) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "temperature") |> last()
from(bucket: "sensor_data") |> range(start: -5m) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "humidity") |> last()

from(bucket: "sensor_data") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "temperature") |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "sensor_data") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "humidity") |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
